channel.title: python on Pedro Junqueira
channel.description: Recent content in python on Pedro Junqueira

item.title: Best Data Science Podcasts
item.description: If I am not doing an Udemy course, testing a tutorial or doing any online course in any break I get to learn as much as I can about Python, Computer Science, Software Engineering, Statistics and Data Science, I am listening to a podcast. I usually do this when I am commuting either riding my bike, on the bus or driving. A good time to listen to a podcast is when I need a break from absorbing too much content by following a course.
